sentences.arabic: قَرَأَ الطَّالِبُ: «الْعَقْلُ السَّلِيمُ فِي الْجِسْمِ السَّلِيمِ».
sentences.translation: Učenik je pročitao: «Zdrav duh u zdravom tijelu».
sentences.translationEn: The student read: «A sound mind in a sound body».

sentences.arabic: يَعْنِي هَذَا أَنَّ صِحَّةَ الْجِسْمِ تُسَاعِدُ عَلَى صِحَّةِ الْعَقْلِ.
sentences.translation: To znači da zdravlje tijela pomaže zdravlju uma.
sentences.translationEn: This means that physical health helps mental health.

sentences.arabic: يَمْشِي كَرِيمٌ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ وَيَأْكُلُ طَعَامًا صِحِّيًّا.
sentences.translation: Karim svaki dan hoda i jede zdravu hranu.
sentences.translationEn: Karim walks every day and eats healthy food.

sentences.translation: On je uvijek aktivan i razmišlja jasno.
sentences.translationEn: He is always active and thinks clearly.
